title: Board Settings
description: Configure default settings for new boards and manage global board policies.
read_only_message: You have read-only access. Contact an administrator if you need to make changes.
page_info: Manage default settings applied when creating new boards. Check the checkbox next to each item to bulk-apply it to existing boards.

sections.general_description: Settings applied immediately across all boards on the user-facing pages
sections.basic_description: Default settings applied when creating a new board. These can be changed individually per board, and the 'Bulk Apply' feature allows you to apply them to existing boards as well.
sections.permissions_description: Default permissions applied when creating a new board
sections.list_description: Settings related to the board list page
sections.report_description: Settings related to the report feature
sections.report_policy_description: Configure automatic report handling and restriction policies
sections.auto_hide_description: Automatically blind posts/comments when reports exceed a threshold.
sections.report_abuse_prevention_description: Limit daily reports per user and block reporting when rejections accumulate. Applied globally across all boards.
sections.spam_security_description: Configure cooldowns and view count security settings
sections.report_notification_description: Configure which administrators receive notifications and how notifications are sent when a report is submitted.
sections.report_permissions_description: Assign roles that can view the report list and process reports (approve, reject, or blind). Admin notifications for new reports are sent based on the 'Process Reports Permission' role.

fields.new_display_hours_hint: Duration to display [New] badge after posting (1-720)
fields.max_comment_depth_hint: Enter a value between 0 and 10. Setting to 0 disables the nested comment feature.
fields.allowed_extensions_placeholder: Type extension and press Enter (e.g., jpg, png, pdf)
fields.notify_admin_on_post_description: Send email to admin when a post is submitted
fields.notify_author_description: Send email to the original author when a comment or reply is posted
fields.auto_hide_threshold_hint: Automatically blind content when reports reach this count. (0=disabled, 1–100)
fields.auto_hide_target_hint: Select the target for auto blind processing.
fields.daily_report_limit_hint: Max reports per user per day across all boards. 0 = no limit. (0–100)
fields.rejection_limit_hint: Reporting will be blocked when rejections exceed the limit within this period. 0 count = no limit. (Count: 0–50, Period: 1–365 days)
fields.report_cooldown_seconds_hint: Minimum interval between consecutive reports. 0 = no limit. (0–3600 sec)
fields.notify_author_on_report_action_descripti: Send a notification to the author when their content is processed (blinded/deleted/restored) due to reports
fields.notify_admin_on_report_description: Sends a notification to administrators with the 'Process Reports Permission' when a report is submitted. The number of notifications sent depends on the scope setting below.
fields.notify_admin_on_report_scope_per_report: Every time a report is submitted
fields.report_view_roles_description: Permission to view the report list and report details.
fields.report_manage_roles_description: Permission to approve, reject, or blind reports. Admin notifications on report submission are also sent to roles with this permission.
fields.blocked_keywords_description: List of keywords to block in posts and comments
fields.blocked_keywords_hint: Posts or comments containing registered keywords will be blocked
fields.post_cooldown_seconds_hint: Wait time between consecutive posts by the same user (0–3600 sec, 0 = no limit)
fields.comment_cooldown_seconds_hint: Wait time between consecutive comments by the same user (0–3600 sec, 0 = no limit)
fields.spam_security_identifier_info: Cooldown and view count deduplication identify members by user_id and guests by IP address
fields.view_count_cache_ttl_hint: Cache duration for view count deduplication (60–604800 sec, max 7 days)
fields.date_display_format_hint: Choose how dates are displayed in post and comment lists. Applied immediately across all boards on the user-facing pages.

descriptions.type: Set the default display format for new boards
descriptions.secret_mode: Set the default behavior for the secret post feature
descriptions.show_view_count: Display view count on post list and detail pages
descriptions.use_report: Enable reporting of inappropriate posts and comments
descriptions.new_display_hours: Duration to display [New] badge after posting (in hours)
descriptions.per_page: Number of posts to display per page on desktop
descriptions.per_page_mobile: Number of posts to display per page on mobile
descriptions.order_by: Set the default sort criteria for the post list
descriptions.order_direction: Set the default sort direction for the post list
descriptions.min_title_length: Set the minimum character count for post titles
descriptions.max_title_length: Set the maximum character count for post titles
descriptions.min_content_length: Set the minimum character count for post content
descriptions.max_content_length: Set the maximum character count for post content
descriptions.use_reply: Must be ON to apply reply post feature to new boards.
descriptions.max_reply_depth: Set the maximum nesting depth for replies (1-5)
descriptions.blocked_keywords: Posts or comments containing registered keywords will be blocked
descriptions.use_comment: Must be ON to apply comment feature to new boards. Comment detail settings below will also apply.
descriptions.comment_order: Set the default sort direction for comments
descriptions.min_comment_length: Set the minimum character count for comments
descriptions.max_comment_length: Set the maximum character count for comments
descriptions.max_comment_depth: Set the maximum nesting depth for nested comments. Setting to 0 disables the nested comment feature (0-10)
descriptions.use_file_upload: Must be ON to apply file attachment feature to new boards.
descriptions.max_file_size: Maximum file size for uploads (in MB)
descriptions.max_file_count: Maximum number of files per post
descriptions.allowed_extensions: Leave empty to allow all file extensions

date_display_format.standard_description: Recent posts show as 'N min ago / N hours ago', this year as 'MM-DD', older as 'YY-MM-DD'
date_display_format.relative_description: All dates shown as relative time (N min · N hours · N days · N months · N years ago)
date_display_format.relative_example: e.g. 3 min ago · 2 hours ago · 5 days ago · 3 months ago · 2 years ago

permissions_table.title: Default Permissions
permissions_table.description: Set which roles can access each permission.
permissions_table.bulk_apply_notice: When bulk applying, the selected permissions will replace the existing roles of each board with the current settings. However, the manager and step roles of each board are preserved as-is.

bulk_apply.title: Bulk Apply to Existing Boards
bulk_apply.description: Apply the above settings to existing boards. Select items and target boards to apply.
bulk_apply.checked_fields_notice: All settings will be saved, then only the checked items will be bulk applied.
bulk_apply.no_boards_notice: No boards available for bulk apply. Please create a board first.

bulk_apply_modal.title: Confirm Bulk Apply
bulk_apply_modal.message: All settings will be saved, then the checked items will be bulk applied. This action cannot be undone.
bulk_apply_modal.message_all: All settings will be saved, then the checked items will be bulk applied. This action cannot be undone.
bulk_apply_modal.warning: This action cannot be undone. Existing settings of the target boards will be overwritten.
bulk_apply_modal.select_boards_required: Please select at least one board.
bulk_apply_modal.save_and_apply_info: Upon confirmation, all settings in the current tab will be saved, and only the checked items will be bulk applied to the selected boards.
bulk_apply_modal.save_error: Failed to save settings. Bulk apply has been cancelled.
bulk_apply_modal.permission_notice: The selected permission items will replace the existing roles of each board with the current settings. However, the manager and step roles of each board are preserved as-is.

meta_settings.title: Meta Settings
meta_settings.description: Set the title and description for each page type to be displayed in search engines.

seo_friendly.title: SEO Pages
seo_friendly.description: Select which pages to provide HTML to search bots.
seo_friendly.cache_description: Manually clear the SEO cache for board pages. The cache is automatically cleared when settings are saved.

notification_definitions.title: Notification Settings
notification_definitions.description: Manage notification templates by channel for the board module.
notification_definitions.toggle_success: Notification active status has been changed.
notification_definitions.reset_success: Notification settings have been reset to default.

reset_modal.title: Reset to Default
reset_modal.confirm_message: All channel templates of this notification will be restored to defaults.
reset_modal.warning_message: The saved subject, body, and recipient settings will be permanently lost.
